properties.Test Case: Test functionality of adding and manipulating SL video overlays. See BL-9976. (JT 6.3: seems to be working well, but the functionality is not exactly as described in BL-9976. We no longer open the sign language tool automatically when adding a video canvas element, nor do we have a button to do so in the toolbox. Rather, there is a prominent button in the new toolbar, right below the video CE. And both videos an images currently have a message in the toolbox that "There are no options for this kind of Canvas Element")
properties.Steps: Test functionality of adding and manipulating SL video overlays. See BL-9976. (JT 6.3: seems to be working well, but the functionality is not exactly as described in BL-9976. We no longer open the sign language tool automatically when adding a video canvas element, nor do we have a button to do so in the toolbox. Rather, there is a prominent button in the new toolbar, right below the video CE. And both videos an images currently have a message in the toolbox that "There are no options for this kind of Canvas Element")
